story-portrait-3f12.query: Velmora began with a simple belief: that demi-fine jewelry should feel as considered as fine jewelry — without the quiet mark-up. Each piece is hand-finished by a small team of artisans, plated in 18K gold over a solid brass core, and inspected twice before it leaves our atelier. Made by hand, in small batches, for the long wear.
